summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex Website Studio Wizard feature completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified the complete wizard flow including template selection, variant strip, wizard chip interactions, multi-select features, free-text chat, Independence modal, and Library modal.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/websites/templates returns 6 templates (store, restaurant, company, portfolio, saas, blank)
Backend: GET /api/websites/wizard/steps returns 10 wizard steps (buttons, colors, typography, features, dashboard, dashboard_items, sections, branding, payment, review)
Backend: GET /api/websites/variants returns 10 style variants
Backend: GET /api/websites/templates/{id}/variants returns 10 variants for template
Backend: GET /api/websites/templates/{id}/variants/{variant_id}/preview-html returns HTML
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects auto-initializes wizard state with step='buttons' and first question in chat
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/wizard/answer with step=buttons,value=full sets theme.radius='full' and advances to 'colors'
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/wizard/answer with step=colors,value=warm applies warm palette (primary=#F59E0B) and advances to typography
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/wizard/answer with step=features as ARRAY saves multiple values and advances to dashboard
Backend: dashboard_items step SKIPS when dashboard='none' (conditional skip working)
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/wizard/answer with step=sections filters sections to only wanted ones (+footer)
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/apply-variant swaps theme but keeps sections by default
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/wizard/chat accepts free-text and returns {project, action, response}
Backend: POST /api/websites/projects/{id}/independence/request returns hosting guides (Vercel/Netlify/GitHub)
Frontend: Login with owner@zitex.com/owner123 successful
Frontend: Empty state shows '3 خطوات' onboarding and template cards at top
Frontend: Clicking template card creates project, shows variant strip with 10 variant cards, wizard starts in chat bar
Frontend: Clicking variant card applies theme without resetting sections
Frontend: Quick-chip click advances wizard and updates preview (tested 3 consecutive steps: buttons→colors→typography)
Frontend: Multi-select chips show 'تأكيد' submit button (tested features step with delivery, reservation, whatsapp)
Frontend: Free-text chat message works alongside chips
Frontend: 'الاستقلالية' (Independence) button opens modal with Vercel/Netlify/GitHub options and NO code visible
Frontend: 'مواقعي' (Library) modal shows saved projects with open/delete buttons
Frontend: 'تصدير HTML' export button is enabled when project exists
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Website Studio Wizard feature fully functional. The wizard has 10 steps: buttons, colors, typography, features, dashboard, dashboard_items (conditional), sections, branding, payment, review. Conditional skip works: dashboard_items is skipped when dashboard='none'. Multi-select chips work with 'تأكيد' submit button. Variant strip shows 10 visual styles. Independence modal shows Vercel/Netlify/GitHub deployment guides without exposing code. All endpoints under /api/websites/* work correctly.

chat_bar.quick_chips: Working - dynamic based on wizard step

export_html.status: Working - button enabled when project exists
